description_long: This is an ornate necklace featuring a series of three oval-shaped pendants, each encrusted with numerous small, sparkling stones that resemble diamonds or crystals. The pendants are arranged vertically, with the largest at the top and two smaller ones below, all connected by delicate metallic links. The necklace chain appears to be made of fine metal, likely silver or white gold, and is attached to the topmost pendant. The overall design is symmetrical and highly decorative, with intricate detailing on the surface of each pendant. The stones are set closely together, creating a shimmering, luxurious effect. The necklace is displayed on a neutral, matte bust stand, highlighting its elegant and elaborate craftsmanship.
description: A luxurious necklace with three vertically aligned, oval-shaped, stone-encrusted pendants on a fine metallic chain, featuring intricate and elaborate detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three oval pendants, their detailed stone settings, and the full length of the necklace chain.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the pendants and the way they hang from the chain, with the profile of the bust stand visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple metallic chain around the neck, with the pendants mostly hidden behind the bust stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth of the pendants and the chain's attachment.
